steps.title: Use Desmos on the discriminant
steps.content: A quadratic has exactly one solution when its discriminant is $0$. For $cx^2+96x-96=0$, the discriminant is $$96^2-4(c)(-96)=96^2+4c(96).$$ In Desmos, enter $y_1=[0]$ and regress $y_1\sim96^2+4c(96)$. Desmos returns $c=-24$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Solving by hand gives $$96^2+384c=0$$ $$9216+384c=0$$ $$c=-24.$$ The answer is -24.
